Command.Name: docs
Command.Description: Output full tool specification in YAML

Command.Name: extract
Command.Description: Extract the zip contents to a destination directory

Argument.Name: zip
Argument.Description: Path to the Retool export .zip file

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: List all file paths in the zip

Argument.Name: zip
Argument.Description: Path to the Retool export .zip file

Command.Name: read
Command.Description: Output the raw contents of a file from the zip

Argument.Name: zip
Argument.Description: Path to the Retool export .zip file

Argument.Name: path
Argument.Description: Path of the file inside the zip
